zekainfo: Champion Crests can be obtained through enlisting at the Champion Tavern, via events, or from specialized bundles. A fixed amount of Champion Crests can be bartered daily using your spare Champion Insignias.

kaleinfo: Following enemy onslaughts, your keep may be engulfed in fire and smoke. Consult the information icon for further details.
kaleinfo1: When your city falls victim to hostile raids, your keep's Durability rating decreases.
kaleinfo2: Should your keep's Durability fall to 0 or lower, your stronghold will be forcefully teleported to a random location.
kaleinfo3: When your keep is no longer actively besieged, its Durability will gradually repair over time.
kaleinfo4: The Durability rating automatically regenerates at a rate of 4 points per minute.
kaleinfo5: Expend 600 Gems to instantly restore 500 Durability points.
kampinsaet: Construct a new Military Camp to expand your maximum expedition capacity.
grupetkisinfo: As Champions grow stronger, your army's maximum unit capacity expands. Deploy Champions directly into your army's formation.
askerEtkisinfo: When all three squad slots in a vanguard consist of the exact same unit class, that specific unit class activates its unique attribute bonuses.

hastanex3: The maximum capacity of the Hospital is strictly limited.
hastanex4: If the Hospital exceeds its maximum capacity, any additional wounded units will pass away instantly due to lack of medical attention.

gar5: As your pool of Garrison Points expands, you can assign Champions to secure newly unlocked resource nodes.

verinf2: You can levy taxes again 15 minutes after your last collection from the Treasury Vault.

verinf4: Every tax collection decreases your keep's overall population by a specific amount.

pi1: The Eagle Market allows you to trade resources throughout the day.
pi2: The Eagle Market listings are automatically refreshed at the end of the day.

tavinf1: Population growth requires a steady supply of Wheat and Water.
tavinf2: If the Tavern cannot meet the population's Water and Wheat consumption demands, your city's population growth rate will decline.

thxOyun: Thank you, and enjoy your campaign!
uyariChat: To preserve a welcoming and constructive community, please observe our core messaging guidelines. Maintain courtesy with all rulers; profanity, slurs, and vulgar phrasing are strictly prohibited. Do not broadcast instigating, toxic, or divisive messages. For your digital protection, avoid sharing personal or private credentials. Lending guidance to new players strengthens our realm. Avoid continuous spamming and respect all standard conditions. Compliance ensures an optimal experience for everyone. Let us forge an honorable community together!
uyariTfak: Allying with a grand faction elevates your gameplay and unlocks powerful benefits. As companions of an Alliance, you can coordinate mutual reinforcement, exchange tactical insight, and form unbreakable fronts. Take part in exclusive clan achievements and events to claim rare bounties and supplement your reserves. Coordinate massive rallies or reinforce endangered walls to dominate global warfare. Engage in real-time tactical chat rooms, uncover advanced game secrets, and foster legendary companionships. Swear allegiance to an Alliance today and seize the throne!

warnpop: Please strictly adhere to our community conduct guidelines!

bat1*d: You managed to reach this far, but your journey ends here!
bat2*d: I admire your courage, but it simply won't suffice!
bat3*d: Do you have any idea how many before you tried to overthrow me?
col1*d: A mere mortal dares to stand against me? Hahaha!
col2*d: You can flee, but you cannot hide!
col3*d: Are you preparing yourself for the grave?
col4*d: I smell your terror, and I feast upon it!
col5*d: That blade? Nothing more than an amusing toy!
col6*d: Grovel before the absolute magnitude of my power!
vol1*d: You will be trapped here for eternity, just like the rest!
vol2*d: This is a conflict you cannot win, fleshling.
yes1*d: My dark sorcery will tear you to pieces!
yes2*d: I perceive your frailty; your end is nigh.
npc1*d: This realm belongs to me, you won't escape alive!
npc2*d: I shall preserve your carcass as a trophy!
npc3*d: You are digging your own grave, do you even realize it?
npc4*d: I expected a challenge... you are a disappointment.
npc5*d: Step forward, I can't wait to crush you beneath my heel!
npc6*d: There can only be one victor here, and it will be me!
npc7*d: Now I unleash my true power, are you prepared?
goblinDis*d: My word is the absolute law in these lands!
kar1*d: The bitter frost will consume you entirely!
kar2*d: There is no escaping the glacial embrace!
kar5*d: Where the snow descends, I follow close behind!

welcomeMsg: Welcome, Sire! Your grand adventure begins now!
w2: A massive WELCOME for joining our ranks!
w3: A courageous and inquisitive adventurer like yourself will always find a home in these realms.
w33: The journey has only just begun, but we can already sense it...
w4: You possess the spark of a true leader!
w6: Now, equip your weapons, establish your settlement, and challenge your adversaries!
w7: Your saga begins unfolding today... and we are absolutely thrilled!
w8: Should you encounter any issues or require assistance, do not hesitate to contact us.
w9: We wish you immense fortune and bountiful plundering!
w10: Please accept this token of appreciation!
g2: We have wonderful news to share!
g3: A brand new update for our game is officially live!
g4: Your adventure resumes with even more excitement! An update packed with fresh features, balance adjustments, bug fixes, and surprises awaits you.
g5: Update your game immediately to experience the latest version!
g6: Smoother gameplay, more intense battles, and abundance of rewards are waiting for you!
b1: Scheduled maintenance will be performed shortly to provide an enhanced gaming experience.
b2: Access to the game will be temporarily unavailable during this period.
b3: We cannot wait to welcome you back as soon as the maintenance concludes!
b4: A smoother gameplay environment and several surprise optimizations await you post-update!
b5: Thank you for your patience and understanding!
b6: The maintenance is scheduled to take place at the following server time:
o2: A brand new social event is commencing, offering incredible rewards to the victors!
o3: Mark your calendar right away to participate in this thrilling challenge!
o5: We shall soon discover who will scale the peak and claim the ultimate prizes!
o6: Do not miss out, as these rewards are exceptionally rare!
o7: You can access the comprehensive event details via the link below.
o9: Tap to proceed to the Event Link!
r1x: If you are enjoying your time in our game, we would highly appreciate it if you could spare a brief moment to rate us!
r2x: Your reviews provide invaluable guidance, helping us improve and deliver a more entertaining experience.
r3x: We are just a single tap away!
r4x: Thank you in advance, and enjoy your campaigns!
p1: The Perfect Moment to Share the Saga!
p2: If you are loving the game, why not invite your companions to join in on the fun?
p3: Greater enjoyment, fiercer challenges, and endless victories await when experienced together!
p4: Summon your allies and invite everyone to join our ranks!
p5: We continue to expand thanks to your unwavering support. We are glad to have you!

fff: Your Castle must be at least Level 3.
fff5: Your Castle must be at least Level 5.
bbb1: What a splendid day for fishing. Tap to cast your line.
bbb2: Care to do some fishing? Tap to cast your line.
bbb3: I have yet to hook the largest fish. Tap to cast your line.
bbb4: I am feeling quite fortunate today. Tap to cast your line.
ggg1: Construct additional Mints to generate more Gold.
ggg2: We can secure abundant resources by launching assaults on other players.
ggg3: Houses expand your maximum population capacity. Keep the Tavern stocked and remember to collect taxes from your citizens.
ggg4: If the Tavern runs out of provisions and water, your population will dwindle. Ensure you restock it regularly.
ggg5: Link your account using your email address so your progress is never lost.
ggg6: Slay monsters to secure precious Gems.
ggg7: Remember, you can spin the Wheel of Fortune 3 times a day to claim fantastic rewards.
ggg8: Upgrade your resource structures to boost your resource production yields.
ggg9: Engaging in regular bartering with Kaelith is the easiest method to obtain rare resources.
ggg10: Should you encounter any difficulties, do not hesitate to reach out to us.
ggg11: Establish or enlist in an Alliance. Strength lies in unity.
ggg12: Upgrading your central Castle level is the fundamental pathway to overall progression.
ggg13: Do not forget to perform your daily hero recruitment at the Hero Tavern.
ggg14: Advance your Castle to the required level to unlock Dragon hunting expeditions.
ggg15: Increasing your workforce of construction builders will drastically accelerate your development speed.
ggg16: Adjusting tax rates at the City Hall will keep your population content.
ggg17: If our Sovereign raises taxes any further, I know not how we shall survive the winter.
ggg18: The Auction House is the absolute best venue to invest your Gold. Do not be hesitant to place bids.
ggg19: The Marketplace was bustling today; the aroma of freshly baked bread filled the entire street.
ggg20: I feel as though my back is about to snap...
ggg21: If we take a brief respite, surely no one will notice, right?
ggg22: Keep your eyes peeled; word has it that bandits have begun multiplying in the woods lately.
ggg23: The city appears peaceful... too peaceful. It fills me with unease.
ggg24: We finally have a proper Barracks. No more sleeping on top of straw for us.
ggg25: Our Lord is truly just; our dining tables have never been this bountiful.
ggg26: Will the ramparts hold? Hide the children in the cellar!
ggg27: Have you heard? The miller's daughter has fallen madly in love with a knight.
ggg28: Good day to you, friend! May the heavens guide your path.
ggg29: Why do you gaze upon me so, Sire? I can feel that massive, unseen eye from the heavens watching my every move...
ggg30: This Tavern was not standing here a moment ago! Our Lord must be a sorcerer, surely?
ggg31: It is as if time itself has frozen... even the birds have ceased flapping their wings. Has our Lord fallen into a trance?
ggg32: I heard a rumor that our Lord plans to melt down the palace silver spoons to pay our wages. I hope it is false; copper has a distinct flavor of its own.
ggg33: You have returned! The city was rather quiet during your absence; we await your commands.
ggg34: We understand that you had no choice but to raise those taxes, Sire. The children go hungry, but at least bandits are not battering down our doors. Thank you.
ggg35: Your armor gleams brighter than ever today, Sire; your grand presence fills our hearts with reassurance.
ggg36: I knew it! We are all just tiny individuals trapped inside a little box, being controlled by someone from above!
ggg37: You are reshaping this city into a magnificent masterpiece, Supreme Architect!
ggg38: Adversaries tremble at the mere mention of your name.
ggg39: It is far safer to fear you than to love you, Sire...
noeng: You have not blocked anyone yet!

insaninf: Never back down on the field of battle; select the Humans for armies endowed with high HP and superior endurance.

thx2: Thank you for accompanying us on this journey and for supporting our game. Every purchase you make helps us refine the experience and deliver better updates. Please accept this small token of our appreciation!

npc1x: Tap on the ruined gate and repair the defensive wall!
npc2x: These ruins shall become our new home. We will rebuild from the ground up. Open the gate.
npc3x: Sire! Drag the building to position it within the green highlighted zone.
hata1q: You cannot perform this action right now!
quideSplash: Elves, dwarves, and men... The ancient alliances have shattered. Goblins and giants have laid the kingdoms to ruin. Your kingdom, too, has fallen. In the wake of this cataclysm, your people are scattered. You must gather your strength and raise your kingdom from its ashes. To rebuild your realm and claim your vengeance is in your hands!
gsahne1: My King, the people are exhausted and starving! The enemy is hot on our heels, and these ruined walls will not protect us!
gsahne2: Fear not. Survival comes first; repair the walls immediately, and then we shall tend to the empty bellies!
gsahne3: We have sealed the walls, but our people have been starving for days. We have no strength left to fight. We must construct a farm and feed our folk.
gsahne4: First we shall satisfy our hunger, then we shall reclaim our strength. Construct a farm at once!
gsahne5: Sire, we urgently require timber for both defences and shelters.
gsahne6: Let the axes swing! Hew trees from the forest and raise this city back to its feet!
gsahne8: My King! The goblin army pursuing us has found our trail; a massive host is closing in!
gsahne9: Incredible! Eldar has frozen the entire vanguard! Yet we must strike before the ice thaws.
gsahne10: Splendid. Raise the walls and rally our legions. The sole sovereign of these lands is none other than myself!
